recommendedLaw: A module may import another module only through /public or /contracts.
Cross-module imports into /policies, /mappers, /ui are discouraged and require facade extraction.
API routes should import only module /public facades, except auth/session facade.
Workflow/orchestration may coordinate multiple modules, but only through public facades or domain events.
Repositories must never import repositories from another module.
Read paths should prefer projections/read models over source-domain repositories.
